parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description: Unique company identifier associated with the Procore User Account.

data.description: Represents a model to get cost item details.

id.description: The unique identifier for the cost item.

type.description: The type of the cost item.

name.description: The name of the cost item.

description.description: The description of the cost item.

unit_cost.description: The unit cost of the cost item.

unit_labor.description: The unit labor required for the cost item.

unit_labor_cost.description: The cost of the unit labor.

manufacturer.description: The manufacturer of the cost item.

catalog_number.description: The catalog number of the cost item.

supplier.description: The supplier of the cost item.

sub_job_code.description: The sub-job code associated with the cost item.

sub_job_name.description: The name of the sub-job associated with the cost item.

cost_code.description: The cost code associated with the cost item.

cost_name.description: The name of the cost code associated with the cost item.

cost_type_code.description: The cost type code associated with the cost item. Applicable only for items categorized under a Custom cost type.

cost_type_name.description: The name of the cost type associated with the cost item. Applicable only for items categorized under a Custom cost type.

waste.description: The waste percentage associated with the cost item.

material_waste.description: The waste percentage associated with the cost item.

item_margin.description: The margin applied to the cost item.

labor_margin.description: The margin applied to the labor for the cost item.

unit_labor_rate.description: The unit labor rate for the cost item.

is_untaxed.description: Indicates whether the cost item is untaxed.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the cost item. (17 possible values)

notes.description: Any additional notes about the cost item.

used_by_item_ids.description: Array of item IDs that use this cost item.

color.description: The color associated with the cost item.

delivery_unit.description: The delivery unit of the cost item.

catalog_id.description: The catalog ID associated with the cost item.

custom.description: Indicates whether the cost item is custom.

sealed.description: Indicates whether the cost item is sealed.

sub_items.description: Array of sub-items associated with the cost item.
